svg.text: A_SDU — Application layer Service Data Unit (Clause 6.4)
Parameters passed across the service primitive. Never transmitted.
The only A_SDU parameter with no A_PDU counterpart.
Mandatory: A_Mtype, A_SA, A_TA, A_TA_type, A_Length, A_Data. [A_AE] only when Mtype = remote diagnostics.
